## FAIR Supporting Resource (FSR) Typology

![Typology](/docs/img/typology.jpg){fig-align="left" width=100%}

## Choosing the right FSR Types

For deciding which resource types to choose, you should be familiar with all type definitions. You can find them in the [FIP ontology](https://peta-pico.github.io/FAIR-nanopubs/fip/index-en.html).
